arts.ttl: Forest owner gets stadium ban after Fulham tunnel incident. Nuno touchline ban for Brighton red card
arts.sum: Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo was given a separate punishment on Friday when fined 55,000 pounds ($72,000) and banned from the touchline for two games after being sent off in his team’s 2-2 draw with Brighton last month. The owner of Nottingham Forest was given a five-match stadium ban on Friday in the latest of a series of sanctions against the Premier League club in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boosted by injury returns ahead of clash with Fulham
arts.sum: Unai Emery has a fully-fit squad to choose from.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said ahead of Aston Villa's trip to Fulham
arts.sum: I think we can feel comfortable how we are now with different options in the starting XI being competitive and how we can get our best level in the squad. Maybe tomorrow or the next matches we are going to play, but I think he is ready.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery has made a request to NSWE which will enhance Aston Villa before defining run
arts.sum: Emery has revealed in an interview with Spanish media outlet RTVE that Villa want to introduce lighting to Bodymoor Heath, at a time when Villa's fixture demands are especially testing; they'll play seven matches spanning three competitions before the November international break in a month. Unai Emery has revealed that he hopes for new floodlights to be installed at Aston Villa's Bodymoor Heath training ground in order to broaden the opportunities to train later in the days.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa injury news: Unai Emery comments on Tyrone Mings, Boubacar Kamara status
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery reveals whether Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara will be in a position to return to the squad for Saturday's Premier League game at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery's lifts lid on plan to prevent Aston Villa concern ahead of Fulham clash
arts.sum: After drawing their last two league games, Villa are looking to return to winning ways against a Fulham side who have made an impressive start to the campaign after collecting 11 points in seven matches. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Team News: Fulham vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gives injury updates on seven Aston Villa players ahead of Fulham clash
arts.sum: Unai Emery has revealed he has a fully fit squad to select from for Aston Villa's trip to Fulham at Craven Cottage, barring the small injury Robin Olsen is dealing with. Asked about the team news, Emery said: "McGinn has trained with us normally and is feeling good, Konsa as well.

arts.ttl: Fresh Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara updates as Aston Villa returns loom
arts.sum: We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it. Mings suffered his ACL injury on the first game of last season at St. James' Park in August 2023, while Kamara has been out since February after sustaining his knee injury in the 2-1 defeat against Manchester United at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Aston Villa: Why Emery needs Leon Bailey to step up for Craven Cottage trip
arts.sum: Despite a tumultuous summer of 2024, over which PSR loomed like the blackest of rainclouds, it’s arguable Aston Villa have started the 2024/25 campaign better than any could have reasonably expe...
